comment: Home — hub for Micropolis + Sims playing pages
title: Micropolis
description: 🏙️🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Combined Micropolis city view and Sims (VitaMoo) animation playground.

title: Micropolis
description: 🏙️ Pan and zoom the SimCity tile engine in the browser (WASM + WebGL/WebGPU).

title: The Sims
description: 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Sims 1 character meshes and animation via VitaMoo / mooshow (integration in progress).

title: About Micropolis
description: 🧐🏛️💡🧑‍💻 An exploration of the history, concepts, creators, and influences behind Micropolis.
tooltip: Learn about Micropolis history and concepts

children.title: Will Wright
children.description: 🎮️🏙️🤖🧠 Meet the visionary game designer who originally created SimCity, Spore, and The Sims.

children.title: Don Hopkins
children.description: 🐧💻🖱️🍕 Learn about the developer who worked on The Sims, ported SimCity, and developed Micropolis.

children.title: Chaim Gingold
children.description: 📖️🏗️📊👨‍🔬 Dive into insights from "Building SimCity," Chaim's book detailing the game's creation.

children.title: Bret Victor
children.description: ✨💡🖼️💻 Explore the work of an influential designer focused on dynamic mediums for thought.

children.title: Stone Librande
children.description: 📄🧩🎮💡 Discover the design philosophy of Stone Librande, known for his insightful one-page documents.

children.title: Ben Shneiderman
children.description: 🖱️👨‍🔬📊💡 Understand the principles championed by the computer scientist who coined "direct manipulation".

children.title: Richard Bartle
children.header: Richard Bartle: Virtual Worlds & Player Types
children.description: 🏰♠️♥️♦️♣️ Co-creator of MUD1 (1978) and originator of the Bartle taxonomy of player types; the MUD → MOO → MOOLLM lineage.

children.title: Yoot Saito
children.description: 🏢🐟🎙️ Japanese designer behind The Tower / SimTower, Seaman, and Odama — and the 1993 interviewer of Alan Kay.

children.title: Constructionist Education
children.description: 🛠️🧱🧑‍🏫🧑‍🎓 An overview of the learning theory where knowledge is built through active creation and sharing.

children.title: Jean Piaget
children.description: 👶🤔🧠🇨🇭 Review the foundational theories of the Swiss psychologist on child cognitive development.

children.title: Seymour Papert
children.description: 🐢🧱💻🧑‍🏫 Meet the MIT mathematician who pioneered AI, developed Logo, and founded Constructionism.

children.title: Marvin Minsky
children.header: Marvin Minsky: AI & Society of Mind
children.description: 🤖🧠🧩👥 Delve into the thinking of an AI founding father, co-founder of MIT's AI Lab.

children.title: Alan Kay
children.description: 💻📖💡👨‍🏫 Learn about the computer scientist, key figure in OOP & GUIs, who envisioned the Dynabook.

children.title: Doreen Nelson
children.description: 🏗️🧱🧑‍🏫🪢 Explore Design-Based Learning (DBL), the hands-on educational methodology.

title: Building SimCity
description: 🏗️📖✍️🔍 Excerpts and info related to Chaim Gingold's book detailing SimCity's design history.
tooltip: Read about the making of SimCity

title: Reverse Diagrams
description: 📊✍️⚙️💡 Chaim Gingold's detailed diagrams visually reverse-engineering SimCity Classic's mechanics.
tooltip: Explore SimCity Classic mechanics through visual diagrams

title: All Content
description: 📚🗺️🔍📜 A comprehensive view of all Micropolis content on a single page.
tooltip: View all content on a single page

title: Micropolis License
description: ⚖️📜✍️🤓 Review the GPL and Public Name licenses that govern this project.

title: Source Code
description: 💻⌨️🐙👨‍💻 Explore the open-source MicropolisCore repository on GitHub. Contribute!
tooltip: View MicropolisCore Source Code on GitHub

title: Please Support
description: 🙏💖👍🪙 Help sustain Micropolis development by supporting Don Hopkins on Patreon.
tooltip: Please Support Don Hopkins on Patreon
